message:
🐛 Fix cluster health flicker and add refresh spin animation (#852)

- Increase frontend fetch timeout from 15s to 35s for agent health checks
  (large clusters like pok-prod-sa return 860KB+ node payloads)
- Increase backend fallback timeout from 10s to 35s
- Increase agent health cache TTL from 30s to 60s to reduce uncached calls
- Add single-rotation animation (animate-spin-once) on cluster refresh
  button click instead of continuous spin

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -466,7 +466,7 @@ func NewMultiClusterClient(kubeconfig string) (*MultiClusterClient, error) {
 		dynamicClients: make(map[string]dynamic.Interface),
 		configs:        make(map[string]*rest.Config),
 		healthCache:    make(map[string]*ClusterHealth),
-		cacheTTL:       30 * time.Second,
+		cacheTTL:       60 * time.Second,
 		cacheTime:      make(map[string]time.Time),
 	}
